body.title: CLOSED: Replace hardcoded ~/TheIgors paths in skills with CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS env var
body.result: CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS=/home/akien/TheIgors/lab/claudecode added to ~/.bashrc; all 29 skill files updated in both ~/.claude/skills/ and agent_datacenter/skills/ (commit 7bbcc26)
body.description:
29 skill files hardcode ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/ paths. This breaks on any machine where the repo lives elsewhere and blocks T-lab-migration-to-agent-datacenter. Define two env vars in shell profiles: AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME (repo root) and CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS (derived tools dir, currently ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode). Do a sed-replace pass over all 29 skill files to use ${CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS} instead.

**Affected files:** All 29 ~/.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md files; ~/.bashrc or ~/.zshrc for env var setup; optionally agent_datacenter/scripts/set-env.sh as installer helper. Also update repo copies under ${AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME}/skills/.
**Design rules:** portability-first (from this decision). No TheIgors imports in agent_datacenter side.
**Scope boundary:** IN: env var definition, skill file path replacement. OUT: moving tool files (T-lab-migration), Windows support (later).
**Test plan:** After change, source ~/.bashrc && echo $CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS returns current path; python3 "${CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS}/cc_queue.py" list runs without error; grep -rl ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode ~/.claude/skills/ returns empty.
**Pass condition:** grep -rl '~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode' ~/.claude/skills/ returns empty and all skill invocations continue to work from a fresh shell.
